# Apache HTTPD (HTTP) — root-to-custom-context-push-url

root-to-custom-context with PUSH relocated to /VAADIN/push.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/app/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
<Location />
    ProxyPass                  "http://vaadin:8080/app/"
    ProxyPassReverse           "http://vaadin:8080/app/"
    ProxyPassReverseCookiePath "/app" "/"
</Location>

<Location /VAADIN/push>
    ProxyPass "ws://vaadin:8080/app/VAADIN/push"
</Location>

<Location /HILLA/push>
    ProxyPass "ws://vaadin:8080/app/HILLA/push"
</Location>
```
